title: AI's Impact on Jobs

modules.title: Jobs at Risk
modules.sub: Identifying which roles AI automation threatens most urgently
modules.description: Learners analyze which job categories and tasks are most vulnerable to AI-driven displacement across key industries. They apply risk-assessment frameworks to evaluate their own roles and sectors. By the end, they have a clear picture of where automation pressure is highest and why.

modules.title: New Opportunities Emerging
modules.sub: Spotting careers and roles that AI is actively creating
modules.description: Learners explore the new job categories, hybrid roles, and expanded functions that AI adoption is generating across industries. They map emerging demand signals to their own professional background and interests. This module helps them reframe AI not only as a threat but as a source of genuine career opportunity.

modules.title: Reskilling for AI Era
modules.sub: Building the skills that keep professionals competitive and relevant
modules.description: Learners evaluate their current skill sets against the competencies most valued in an AI-augmented workplace, including technical literacy, critical thinking, and human-AI collaboration. They design a personal reskilling roadmap with prioritized learning actions and realistic timelines. The module emphasizes practical steps over abstract advice.

modules.title: Future Workforce Planning
modules.sub: Preparing teams and organizations for long-term AI-driven change
modules.description: Learners shift to a strategic lens, examining how organizations can anticipate workforce needs, structure roles, and build cultures that adapt as AI capabilities evolve. They work through planning scenarios that account for different rates of automation and talent availability. The module closes with actionable frameworks professionals can bring directly back to their teams or leadership conversations.

synopsis: Examine how AI automation affects different industries and job roles. Learn strategies for adapting your career in an AI-driven economy.
